# Page 1^page=1
1 Agenda Data Spaces Kickstart Event Industrial data spaces – just one click Date/Time: March 12th, 2026 10:00 – 16:30 CET Location: IDTA, Lyoner Straße 18, Frankfurt am Main, Germany Participation First-come first-serve, priority for members of • IDTA • IDSA • Partners of Fraunhofer IESE Registration: Registration Link 10:00 Registration 10:00 Welcome and opening Christian Mosch (IDTA), Lars Nagel (IDSA) and Thomas Kuhn (Fraunhofer IESE) 10:15 Building up dataspaces with MX-Ports Roland Rosen (Siemens) 10:45 Furniture-X - The dataspace for the furniture industry Klaus Bröhl (Integrated Worlds) 11:15 Coffee Break 11:45 Collaboration in value chains – Applying data spaces in the semiconductor industry Haris Avgoustinos (EXPO21XX) 12:15 Gartner’s hype cycle for manufacturing data spaces Bettina Tratz-Ryan (Gartner Group) 12:45 Professional Data Space Service Applications Marco Jacob (Computacenter), René-Pascal Fischer (Roche) 13:15 Lunch Break

# Page 2^page=2
2 14:15 Beginning of the Workshop Tracks: “Benefits of a data spaces” For Decision Maker (3 x 30 min) 1. Supply Chain Niklas Midolo (Cofinity-X) 2. Machine – AAS Integration David Sonnenberg (Sick) 3. AI – Agentic AI Malte Gasseling (Think-IT) For Developer (3 x 30 min) 1. Asset Data Exchange Hub Sandeep Rudra (IDTA) Alaettin Dogan (Neoception) 2. The Data Space Protocol Anil Turkmayali (IDSA) Markus Spiekermann (Huawei) 3. AAS Dataspace for Everbody Frank Schnicke (Fraunhofer IESE) René-Pascal Fischer (Roche) 15:45 Coffee Break 16:15 How does it all fit together – Conclusion of the Event Christian Mosch (IDTA), Lars Nagel (IDSA) and Thomas Kuhn (Fraunhofer IESE) 16:30 End of the Data Spaces Kickstart Event
